query:
SELECT 
  b.id as portalBookingId,
  b.ptsRef,
  b.topdogRef,
  b.clientName,
  b.clientEmail,
  b.destination,
  b.departureDate,
  b.numberOfNights,
  b.grossCost,
  b.expectedCommission,
  b.passengers,
  b.currentStage,
  b.bookedDate,
  u.name as agentName,
  u.email as agentEmail
FROM bookings b
JOIN users u ON u.id = b.userId
WHERE u.email IN (
  'victoria@hoponboardtravel.co.uk',
  'hello@jdmtravel.co.uk',
  'wayne@onpointtravel.co.uk',
  'thecactustravel@gmail.com',
  'bookings@escapeintotheblue.co.uk',
  'abigail@acescapes.co.uk',
  'louise@lavatravel.co.uk',
  'thorpec03@hotmail.co.uk',
  'shanesholidaydreams@thejltgroup.co.uk',
  'jessicafisher@thejltgroup.co.uk',
  'kerrypudge@hotmail.com',
  'bramleytravel@outlook.com',
  'arrowslin@gmail.com',
  'amore.travel@thejltgroup.co.uk',
  'malcolmmunroe@googlemail.com',
  'anna@lovetravelbyanna.com',
  'kayleigh@dreamscape-travel.co.uk',
  'francesca.webster@thejltgroup.co.uk',
  'jeromebradpiece@thejltgroup.co.uk'
)
ORDER BY u.email, b.departureDate ASC;
